title: Pigler
description: Turns the boring strider into a really big pig
body:
This texture-pack turns the strider into pigler!
It now looks like a pig and its cursed.

The pack changes the strider model, texture and even sounds!
Now has snout and the body is longer! Also sounds like a pig :D
Requires Entity Texture Features and Entity Model Features OR Optifine. Tested with ETF and EMF
Originally made for OneMob jam on PMC, hope yall like it :D




:)
